flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 58% at Northern Oklahoma College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.9k vs 4.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northern Oklahoma College fell 33% between 2006 and 2009 (26.9% → 18.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northern Oklahoma College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.8k → $11.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northern Oklahoma College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $5.1k).
